org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure

Interface SubFigure

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Comparable<ViewComponent>, PropertyOwner, Serializable, ViewComponent
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure, AbstractModelObjectSubFigure, AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure, AbstractSubFigure, AnchorFigure, InvisibleCircleAnchorFigure, InvisibleEllipsoidAnchorFigure, InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure, InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure

    public interface SubFigure
extends ViewComponent
    This interface represents a generic figure. All the coordinates in a subfigure are relative to its containing figure.

    The active state of a subfigure depends on the semantics of this subfigure. It is used by the parent figure to change the drawing of the subfigure from active to inactive. The way how a subfigure is activated depends on the subfigure itself.

    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Method Detail

      • getParent

        Figure getParent()
        Replies the containing figure.
        Returns:
        the containing figure.

      • getAbsoluteX

        float getAbsoluteX()
        Replies the absolute x position.

        absX = parentNode.x + this.x

        Returns:
        the absolute x position.

      • getAbsoluteY

        float getAbsoluteY()
        Replies the absolute y position.

        absY = parentNode.y + this.y

        Returns:
        the absolute y position.
